title: Is Regions Financial (RF) Stock Undervalued Right Now?
text: Here at Zacks, our focus is on the proven Zacks Rank system, which emphasizes earnings estimates and estimate revisions to find great stocks. Nevertheless, we are always paying attention to the latest value, growth, and momentum trends to underscore strong picks.

title: Regions Financial to Announce Third Quarter 2023 Financial Results on Oct. 20, 2023
text: BIRMINGHAM, Ala.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Regions Financial Corp. announced the company is scheduled to release its third quarter 2023 financial results on Friday, Oct. 20, 2023.

title: Regions Financial Announces Matt Lusco to Retire, Russell Zusi to Serve as Chief Risk Officer
text: BIRMINGHAM, Ala.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Regions Chief Risk Officer Matt Lusco will retire at the end of 2023 following a nearly 45-year career. Russell Zusi has been named as his successor.

title: Should You Hold Regions Financial (RF) for Its Dividend Yield?
text: Amid uncertain economic conditions, investors may desire to hold solid dividend-yielding stocks like Regions Financial (RF) in their portfolios for a steady income stream.

title: Regions Financial (RF) Aided by NII & Loan Growth Amid Cost Woes
text: A rise in net interest income and solid balance sheet bode well for Regions Financial (RF). However, a lack of diversification in the loan portfolio and elevated costs are concerns.

title: Regions Financial: Upgraded To Strong Buy, A 5% Dividend Yield Opportunity
text: Regions Financial gets upgraded to Strong Buy today, from Buy rating in June. This is more bullish than analyst & quant system consensus. Positives: Dividend yield over 5%, capital strength, earnings YoY growth, reasonable valuation, reasonable share price vs moving average. Downside risk of recent Moody's bank downgrades has been discussed.
